Web app configured to run on port 5173 with strict port
Extension configured to run on port 5174 with strict port

tasks.title: Update package.json names and scripts in all apps and packages
tasks.description: Update package.json files in apps/web, apps/extension, and all packages to have correct package names reflecting monorepo scope. Add or update scripts for build, test, lint, and typecheck. Ensure root package.json scripts only orchestrate workspace commands and do not run dev for all apps.
acceptanceCriteria: All package.json files have correct names with monorepo scope
All apps and packages have build, test, lint, and typecheck scripts
Root package.json scripts only orchestrate workspace commands
Separate dev commands exist for web and extension apps
No root dev command that starts all apps simultaneously

commands: pnpm run build --filter=apps/web && pnpm run build --filter=apps/extension && pnpm run lint --filter=packages/** && pnpm run typecheck --filter=packages/**

tasks.expectedResult: All package.json files updated with correct names and scripts, root package.json orchestrates workspace

outputPlan.description: Update name and scripts for web app
Update name and scripts for extension app
Update names and scripts for packages
Update root package.json scripts for workspace orchestration

metadata.inputContext: Apps and packages moved and configured
evidence: pnpm lint and typecheck succeed for packages
Root package.json scripts do not run dev for all apps
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Standardizes package names and scripts for monorepo consistency

tasks.title: Add safe AI validation commands for typecheck, lint, test, ai, and build
tasks.description: Add validation scripts in root package.json and all apps/packages package.json files for safe AI validation. These commands run one-time checks only (no watch or dev mode), do not spawn Vite directly, and limit Vitest workers. Commands include typecheck, lint, test, ai (custom AI validation), and build.
acceptanceCriteria: Validation commands exist in root and all package.json files
Commands do not run dev or watch mode
Commands do not run Vite directly
Vitest workers limited for AI validation
AI validation commands run successfully

commands: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run ai && pnpm run build

tasks.expectedResult: Safe AI validation commands added and verified to run without spawning dev or watch processes

outputPlan.description: Add validation scripts in root package.json
Add validation scripts in web app package.json
Add validation scripts in extension app package.json
Add validation scripts in all packages package.json

metadata.inputContext: Monorepo with apps and packages configured
evidence: Validation commands run successfully without dev or watch

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables safe AI validation without spawning dev or watch processes
